title: ANC - 10.-ANC is OFF without selected values and the User does not toggle it ON during a call when Transparency is ON before a call
scenario: When ANC is off and Transparency Mode is on before a call, during the call Transparency becomes greyed out and disabled, then returns to its previous state after the call ends.
steps: Set ANC to OFF with no value selected.
Set Transparency Mode to ON (set to Environment or Speech).
During the call, observe ANC state.
During the call, observe Transparency Mode state.
Tap the Transparency toggle during the call.
After the call, observe ANC state.
After the call, observe Transparency Mode state.
Verify that the user can toggle between ANC and Transparency modes normally.
expected: During the call: ANC remains OFF with no value selected; Transparency Mode becomes greyed out and turned OFF. Tapping the Transparency toggle shows a popup that the option is unavailable. After the call: ANC stays OFF with no value selected; Transparency returns to ON with its previous value; the user can toggle between ANC and Transparency modes normally.
